name: grouped-sidebar
title: Grouped Sidebar
author: worthingtravis <https://github.com/Worthingtravis>
description: Grouped sidebar navigation with responsive mobile slide-over. Renders items under group headings with active state highlighting and custom link rendering.
docs: Pass `groups` array with `title` and `items`. Use `activeId` for highlight state. Provide `renderLink` for framework-specific routing (e.g. Next.js Link). Set `mobileBreakpoint` to control responsive behavior.
